title: trevoria glumacea
intro: Trevoria glumacea is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Trevoria glumacea include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antibacterial agent, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Trevoria glumacea can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infused oils for its medicinal use.
